compare.title: Path difficulty comparison
compare.subtitle: Teams sorted by average opponent FIFA points (higher = harder path)
compare.selectTeamHint: Select a team on the Analysis page to see deltas

about.title: About CupPath
about.methodologyBody: CupPath measures how difficult each team's World Cup path is using FIFA ranking points. Higher opponent points mean a harder match. Average path difficulty is the mean of opponent points across played and scheduled matches.
about.rankGapBody: Rank gap is opponent rank minus team rank. A negative gap means a harder opponent (they are ranked higher). A positive gap means an easier opponent.
about.dataBody: Match data comes from openfootball/worldcup.json (2026). FIFA rankings come from the World Football Ranking API on RapidAPI, cached hourly in Vercel Blob.
about.rankingModesBody: Ranking snapshots match FIFA release dates: 19 January, 1 April, and 11 June 2026. Live mode uses the current FIFA ranking and refreshes hourly in production.
